other_observers: Emily MacDonald, Emilee Tarnowski, Stephen Tarnowski
description: First spotted by Mike Thompson on March 30, 2024.  Observed by us at same location on March 31, 2024.  Small white hawk.  White body with dark shoulders, and dark area around eye.  Grey back and primaries while perched.  Long tail.  Viewed bird in perched position for over 30 minutes.  Two Common Ravens mobbed the kite causing it to take flight and fly for a while.  Bird was smaller than the two Common Ravens.  Observed long white tail and dark wing tips.  Saw overall dihedral wing shape with ends of wings slightly more upturned forming an overall shallow "U" shaped dihedral.  Bird hovered multiple times dropping lower each time until landing again.
